definitions.vi: Cảm thấy an tâm hoặc yên lòng về điều gì đó.
definitions.es: Estar tranquilo o sentirse seguro acerca de algo.
definitions.en: To be at ease or to feel secure about something.

example.en: You can rest assured, everything will be fine.
example.es: Puedes estar tranquilo, todo estará bien.
example.vi: Bạn hãy yên tâm, mọi thứ sẽ ổn thôi.

exampleSentences: Em cứ yên tâm, anh sẽ đến đón em đúng giờ.
Chị yên tâm khi biết con trai mình đã về nhà an toàn.
Sau khi nghe giải thích, mọi người đều yên tâm hơn về kết quả.
notes_md:
**Yên tâm** = don’t worry / feel at ease. It’s about feeling mentally calm because you believe things will be okay.

It describes a person’s state of mind. You can use it alone to reassure someone, like telling them to relax.


Close synonym: **an tâm** (a bit more formal). Opposite: **lo / lo lắng** (to worry).

translation.en: You can be at ease when you are here.

content.sentence: Bạn có thể ___ khi ở đây.

translation.en: You can be at ease when you are here.

content.sentence: Bạn có thể ___ khi ở đây.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Don't worry, I will pick you up on time.
(She) don't worry, when she knows her son is home safely.
After hearing the explanation, (everyone) don't worry about the result.
notes:
Yên tâm = don’t worry / feel at ease. It’s about feeling mentally calm because you believe things will be okay.

It describes a person’s state of mind. You can use it alone to reassure someone, like telling them to relax.

Close synonym: an tâm (a bit more formal). Opposite: lo / lo lắng (to worry).
